mapper.select: select COUNT(*) from dayoff_apply where openid=#{openid} and is_pass=1 and dayoff_time like #{dayOffTime}
SELECT * FROM `dayoff_apply` where openid = #{openid} ORDER BY apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: insert into dayoff_apply(openid, dayoff_time, contact, reason, type) values (#{openid},#{dayOffTime},#{contact},#{reason},#{type})
